name: ebenova-legal-docs
description: Generate professional legal documents via AI — NDAs, freelance contracts, tenancy agreements, and 31 more document types across 18 jurisdictions including Nigeria, Kenya, UK, Canada, and globally.

fields.description: Document fields like party names, jurisdiction, terms

tools.name: extract_from_conversation
tools.description: Extract structured contract fields from a WhatsApp or email conversation

conversation.description: The conversation text to extract fields from

tools.name: list_document_types
tools.description: List all 34 supported legal document types

tools.name: check_usage
